creator: dor.bsd@xm0.uk
text:
Created attachment 222277
sysutils/node_exporter: Update to v1.1.0

This patch updates node_exporter to v1.1.0.

The patch is larger than usual, due to the removal of the vendor/ directory upstream, meaning the port now has to make use of the GH_TUPLE system.

A full changelog is available at: https://github.com/prometheus/node_exporter/releases/tag/v1.1.0

-David
